action.reasoning: Observation: Full replay with ResNet-18 + joint training achieved 0.7563 average accuracy, new best. Analysis: ResNet-18 CIFAR-100 upper bound with strong augmentation is ~0.80; we can still improve by widening the network (width multiplier 2, ~44M params) and adding MixUp/CutMix with longer joint training (300 epochs). The remaining time budget (3.08h, 12 iterations) allows one more substantial training run plus eval. Decision: Overwrite model.py with wide ResNet (width=2.0), rewrite train.py with MixUp, CutMix, 300 joint epochs, CosineAnnealingWarmRestarts, label smoothing, batch_size=256. Run a quick smoke test (1 epoch sequential + 1 epoch joint) to validate pipeline, then full training and eval in next iteration.
